title: Katana
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword.
body:
# For correct work you need Optifine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
Rename your sword "Katana" to make it a katana. When taking a katana in the second hand, it will be sheathed.![in the main hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01daa9b3f1e602d67566ee0373bf407f12c60ce9_0.webp)
![in the second hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23dee49e977972a5959510a862e429e5964bfb0_0.webp)
